prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2                        026年持续位列全国第3名，属于全国顶尖高校阵营，对高分考生吸引力极强，位次长期稳定在极高位；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风等舆情                        事件，但抖音综合热度排名第14（高热），公众关注度依然很高；历史投档异常信号为低关注至中关注，未见明显断档记录，整体报考热度未受显著冲击；浙江                        大学拥有A+学科13个（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、控制科学与工程、光学工程、机械工程、土木工程、化学工程与技术、动力工程及工程热物理、药学、管理科学与工程、生                        态学、植物保护、外国语言文学等），A/A-学科20余个，学科实力极强，对考生吸引力持续强劲。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 336 → 342 → 265 → 256 → 297, showing an overall forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers) in recent years, reaching the best level in 2023–2024, with a slight backward movement to 297 in 2025; the fluctuation range in the past 3 years was about 256–342, with a baseline of about 297 in 2025; the enrollment plan for Physics Category was 35 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 32 in 2024, and 34 in 2025, showing a steady expansion trend; the 2026 (§7) plan is 36, an increase of 2 (+5.9%) compared to 2025, a moderate expansion that alleviates competition to some extent but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked 3rd nationally in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top-tier university camp, with extremely strong appeal to high-scoring candidates and long-term stable high rankings; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and other public opinion incidents, but the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 14th (high heat), with still high public attention; historical admission anomaly signals range from low to medium attention, with no obvious gaps recorded, and overall application heat has not been significantly impacted; Zhejiang University has 13 A+ disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Pharmacy, Management Science and Engineering, Ecology, Plant Protection, Foreign Languages and Literature, etc.), and more than 20 A/A- disciplines, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, maintaining strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information remains high; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province increased from 216,000 in 2021 to 363,000 in 2025, with an estimated 365,000 in 2026 (based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 59.8%), showing continuous expansion of the candidate pool; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, intensifying overall competition; Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, in the core area of the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal; although Hebei is not the home province/neighboring province, as a top national university, cross-province application heat remains undiminished. Considering the forward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion in 2026 (+5.9%), the increase in Physics Category candidates in Hebei, and the rise in the provincial control line, the expansion exerts backward pressure on rankings, but the top-tier school level and strong disciplinary appeal provide support; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 312, with a range of 262–362.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Honors Program Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Outstanding Engineer Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information)
- Engineering Experimental Class (EE Category) (including Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Robotics Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Automation and Optoelectronics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Science and Innovation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 262–362, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 260), focus on aiming for flagship majors like the Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., after 350), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 137 → 143 → 188 → 226 → 217, showing a general backward trend in recent years (ranking numbers increasing). In 2024, it reached the most backward ranking of 226 in recent years, and in 2025, it slightly moved forward to 217. The fluctuation range over the past three years is approximately 188–226, with a baseline of about 217 in 2025. Enrollment plans for History Category: 18 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 22 in 2024, 26 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 33, an increase of 7 (+26.9%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that notably alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it consistently ranks 3rd nationally, belonging to the top-tier university camp, which strongly attracts high-scoring History Category candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and other public opinions, but the overall Douyin popularity ranking is 14th (high heat), indicating still high public attention. The abnormal signal for History Category admissions is medium concern, with no obvious gaps, and overall application heat is stable. Zhejiang University's advantageous disciplines related to History Category include Chinese Language and Literature (A), Foreign Languages and Literatures (A+), Journalism and Communication (A-), Law (A), Applied Economics (A-), Business Administration (A), Education (A-), etc., with strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Law, Economics, and Business Administration have stable to slightly hot social popularity. The number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province increased from 202,000 in 2021 to 244,000 in 2025, and is estimated to be about 245,000 in 2026 (estimated based on the recent History Category proportion of about 40.2%), with the candidate scale continuously expanding. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) fluctuated from 454 points in 2021 to 477 points in 2025, indicating overall intensified competition. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, in the core area of the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal. Cross-province application heat remains undiminished.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+26.9%), the increase in History Category candidates in Hebei Province, and the upward trend of the provincial control line, expansion is the main influencing factor, exerting downward pressure on rankings, but the top-tier school level and strong disciplinary appeal provide support. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 257, with a range of 207–307.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 200), you can focus on aiming for flagship majors such as the Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Science Experimental Class and Law. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., after 300), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net to ensure admission.
